text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is drawing to a close, and the
students are getting ready to head back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer. Do you see the expressions on
their faces?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Ryan! Once we get back, let's hit the
track!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you think I'm the same racer I was before camp,
you've got another thing coming! You're going
down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who's going down! I've been
itching to run since I got outta bed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How much stronger have I gotten?! How much
better of a racer am I?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My pecs are crying out... They've gotta know!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They have a little more pep in their step, wouldn't
you say? And it's all because they can feel how
much they've improved.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Summer training has a way of bringing the best
out of our students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have no doubt they will all make marvelous
debuts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And if my planning has contributed to their future
success in some way, I will be more than satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly think I am so weak as to falter at this
hurdle?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no trace of the loss of composure that I
saw a few days ago.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're staring, Trainer. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean to ask if I feel I've improved over
the course of the camp?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. And now I'm ready to sally forth.
My charge will be unstoppable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so this year's summer camp comes to an end.
